TestCase.name: testQ9
TestCase.Resource: LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[AVG($0)], EXPR$0=[AVG($1)], EXPR$0=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(SS_EXT_SALES_PRICE=[$15], SS_NET_PAID=[$20]) LogicalFilter(condition=[SEARCH($10, Sarg[[1..20]])]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[STORE_SALES]])
